title: anemopaegma rugosum
intro: Anemopaegma rugosum is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae, commonly known as a type of vine or climbing plant. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. Anemopaegma rugosum can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds for potential therapeutic applications.
